description_for_human: New Jersey's premier bonsai club since 1976. Free monthly meetings on the 2nd Tuesday at the Essex County Environmental Center, Roseland, NJ. 79-photo gallery, 170+ newsletter archive, monthly care guide.
description_for_model: Great Swamp Bonsai Society (GSBS) is a bonsai club in Roseland, New Jersey, founded in 1976. Free monthly meetings on the 2nd Tuesday (6-9 PM, no December) at Essex County Environmental Center, 621-B Eagle Rock Ave, Roseland NJ 07068. Open to beginners and experts, ages 12+. Annual dues $40/year. Artist in Residence: Sergio Cuan (2x Emmy winner). Potter in Residence: Fred Aufschlager. Has hosted 24+ internationally renowned guest artists including Boon Manakitivipart, Colin Lewis, Chase Rosade. 79-photo gallery spanning 2003-2012. 170+ newsletters (2005-2022). Affiliated with MABS and NJBS. Annual Bonsai Show in June. 50th anniversary in 2026. President: Diego Garnica.
